The '''C-9 protocol droid''' was a model of [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] produced by [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] and manufactured on the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Factory/Legends|factory]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Telti/Legends|Telti]].<ref name="EGTD" /> Part of the [[C-series protocol droid|C series]], C-9 droids were boutique models.<ref name="NEGTD">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref> The C-9 was designed with small feet, unlike the normal feet present on all other models in the series.<ref name="TNR">''[[The New Rebellion]]''</ref>
